headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' *.googleapis.com https://apis.google.com https://www.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' fonts.googleapis.com; font-src fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: *.gstatic.com *.googleapis.com *.ggpht.com; connect-src 'self' *.firebaseio.com *.googleapis.com *.google.com *.firebaseapp.com; frame-src 'self' *.firebaseapp.com https://www.google.com;
